scripts.autofix: pnpm dedupe --prefer-offline && pnpm --filter github-app run autofix && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run autofix && pnpm --filter slint-gallery run typecheck && pnpm knip
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter github-app run typecheck && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run typecheck && pnpm --filter slint-gallery run typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter github-app run lint && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter github-app run lint:fix && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm --filter github-app run format && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter github-app run format:check && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run format:check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter github-app run test && pnpm --filter slint-bridge-kit run test
